titleStmt.title: SII 41.269: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 269. (A.R. No. 486 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the third gōpura of the Vataranyesvara temple at Tiruvalangadu, right of entrance.

p.hi: Chōḻa, Rajakesarivarman Rājādhirāja I, Year 28 = 1046 A.D.

summary.p: Sale of land by the assembly of Nittavinōda-chaturvēdimangalam in Mēnmalai Mēlūr-nāḍu to the temple. The donor who paid the sale price of the land seems to be Rājēntira-Kaḷappāḷan and the land was meant for maintaining a water-shed.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷertarutaṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇarntu ceṅcoloccik karuṅkalikaṭintu maṉṉu pallūḻiyuḷ teṉṉavar muvaruḷ mānāparaṇaṉ poṉmuṭiyāṉāp parumatiṭ pacun=tantalai porukaṭattarintu virakeraḷaṉai Āṉaikkiṭuvittacaivil cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉaitticaikeṭat tollai mullaiyūrtturatti Olkalil veṇāṭṭaraicaic ceṇāṭṭotukki mepukaḻirāmakuṭamuvar keṭa muṉintu velaikeḻukāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟuppittu tākava mallaṉuñ cakkevukenṟāṅkarum paṭaiyālāṅka
vaṉ ceṉaiyum kaṇṭappayyanuṅ kaṅkātiraṉum vaṇṭamar kaḷiṟṟoṭumaviya tiṇṭiṟal virutarvikkiyum vicaiyātittaṉum karumuṟaṭ cāṅkamayyaṉum mutaliṉar samaṟapīru Ottuṭai nimircuṭarppoṉṉoṭayaṅkari puraviyoṭu piṭittu taṉṉāṭaiyiṟ ceyaṅkoṉṟoṉṉār koḷḷippākkaiyuḷḷeri maṭuppittorutaṉit taṇṭāṟ porutiraiyuṭutta vilaṅkaiyaṟk kiṟaivaṉ nilaṅkal muṭipurintu muṉṟanakkuṭain=ta teṉṭiṟaiy yiḻamaṇṭalamuḻuvatumiḻanteḻkaṭal Īḻampukkiḻaṅkecaṉākiya vikkiramapāṇṭiya
ṉ parumaṇimuṭitavittu villavar minavar veñciṉac caḷukkiyar villavar mutalinar vaṇaṅka viṟṟirun=ta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉ Uyarperupukaḻ kovirājakecarivanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājātirājatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 10 2 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu meṉmalai melūrnāṭṭu nittavinota catuppeti maṅkalattumahāsabhaiyom vilaiyāvaṇak kaiyeḻuttu meṉmalai paḻaiyanūr nāṭṭu paḻaiyanūr tiruvālaṅkāṭu Uṭaiyār Ātidāsaśaṇ
ṭeśvaradevaṟkku Iṟaiyili devatāṉamāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷūr teṉpiṭākai paṉaipākkattu Eriaka mkāṭum paḻaiyanūr Eri riyattoṭṭum
kiḻikaiccelak koṇṭu Orukālāvatu mirukālāvatu mukkālāvatu peṟu
kkāṇi kiḻikaiccelakkoṇṭu viṟṟuk kuṭuttamaikku Iṉṉilañ cuṭṭi viṟaiyum nāṅkaḷe yiṟu
ppatākavum Innilañ cuṭṭiyātoru Iṟaiyuṅ kāṭṭap peṟātomākavum Innilattil Iṟa
yiraṅkuḻikoṇṭu tiruvālāṅkāṭuṭaiyār paṅkuṉiyuttiratirunāḷ cevitta Aṭiyāṟku Eḻu tirunāḷum A
mutu ceyvikkavum can=tiracekaran taṇṇirpantal nilaippan=tal Eḻu Aṭṭakkaṭavitāka Āyiraṅkuḻiyum
vilaikkāṇi kiḻikaiccela koṇṭu can=tirātittaval niṟpatāka
meṟpaṭiyān rājentrikkaḷappāḷa
Iṭṭaṉāṟ cāṇiḷattu tarātiruviḷakkuṉālu .
Digital edition of SII 41.269 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
